content: node:test is stable in Node.js 20+ (released April 2023). Supports describe/it/test/beforeEach/afterEach/mock/assert. ESM import: import { test, describe, it } from 'node:test'. Run with: node --test (auto-discovers *.test.js, *.spec.js, test.js). Coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage. Reporters: tap (default), spec (--test-reporter=spec), junit. Works natively with ESM modules. Zero external dependencies.
